title: ipomoea llaveana
intro: Ipomoea llaveana, also known as the 'Pink Princess' or 'Mexican Morning Glory', is a species of flowering vine native to Mexico. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ipomoea llaveana include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea llaveana can be made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water or oil, and are often used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
